name: Piquant Thai Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Fresh mint leaves, coarsely chopped
1 tsp Lime peel, grated or minced
1 tbsp Cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp Cold water
recipeInstructions:
From "Pacific Flavors" by Hugh Carpenter. (Stewart, Tabori and Chang, 1990).
1. In a small saucepan, combine tomato sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, chili sauce, garlic, mint, and lime peel.
2. Bring mixture to a low boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Return sauce to a gentle boil and stir in the cornstarch mixture until it lightly thickens.
5. Strain through a sieve placed over a small serving bowl into a dish that will fit inside.
6. Allow to cool at least 10 minutes; serve at room temperature.
7. Best served with chilled shrimp.
